selections.name: Bradbury (ire)
selections.reason: Class 73 aligns well with his 87 speed figure, avoiding the disparity cap. Solid recent form makes him a strong contender.

selections.reason: Speed figure of 90 is capped due to class disparity, but still presents a formidable presence dropping into this handicap.

selections.name: Gwen's Girl
selections.reason: Consistent mid-pack runner with an 80 speed figure; should get a ground-saving trip from the inside post.

selections.name: Adores (ire)
selections.reason: Raw speed of 94 is penalized heavily by the class disparity cap (68 class), but tactical speed keeps her in the mix.

danger_horse.reason: Presser type with an 88 speed figure; could capitalize if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Better Nature
selections.reason: Outstanding 100 speed figure paired with a 97 class rating. Drawn perfectly on the rail to control the race.

selections.name: Kach Above
selections.reason: Solid 91 speed figure and 86 class rating; a logical threat to the top choice.

selections.name: Farndale
selections.reason: Massive 105 raw speed but heavily capped due to a low 67 class rating. Dangerous if the speed translates.

selections.name: Waiting For Archie
selections.reason: Speed of 94 capped by a 63 class rating, but has shown enough early foot to hit the board.

danger_horse.name: Pertinent
danger_horse.reason: Could surprise at a price if the favorites duel early.

selections.name: Celtic Charioteer
selections.reason: Boasts a 98 speed figure and 97 class rating. Looks a cut above this maiden field.

selections.reason: Raw speed of 98 is capped by a 76 class rating, but still projects as a major player despite the outside draw.

selections.name: Mottaret
selections.reason: High 109 speed figure capped by a 67 class rating. If he runs to his raw speed, he will be tough to catch.

selections.name: Allaboutthelunch
selections.reason: Honest 74 speed and 74 class rating; a reliable underneath option for exotics.

danger_horse.name: Tiger In The Tree
danger_horse.reason: 101 raw speed capped by 63 class; inside draw could help him outrun his odds.

selections.name: Vichenza
selections.reason: Consistent 74 speed and 84 class rating; should pick up the pieces for a minor award.

selections.name: Muchacho (ire)
selections.reason: First-time starter or lacking data; included by default in this small field.

selections.reason: 102 speed figure capped by 81 class. Strong recent form makes her the one to beat.

selections.reason: 97 speed capped by 78 class. Consistent performer who should be right in the mix.

selections.name: Nebbia

selections.reason: 99 speed capped by 72 class. Has the raw ability to factor if the pace is honest.

selections.name: Tilsworth Max
selections.reason: 93 speed and 72 class rating. Inside draw and consistent figures make him a narrow top pick in a wide-open race.

selections.name: Shark Two One
selections.reason: 90 speed and 73 class rating. Overcomes the outside draw with strong late pace.

selections.name: Shes Got The Blues (ire)

selections.name: Kode Grey (ire)
selections.reason: 84 speed and 66 class rating. A logical inclusion for the bottom of the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Bungle Bay (ire)
danger_horse.reason: 82 speed and 71 class; capable of outrunning his rating if he gets a clean break.

selections.name: Seagolazo (ire)
selections.reason: 94 speed and 85 class rating. Tactical speed should have him perfectly positioned.

danger_horse.reason: 101 speed capped by 81 class; a major threat if he can dictate terms.

selections.name: A Lott Of Kane (ire)

selections.name: Antiphon (ire)

selections.reason: 92 speed capped by 66 class rating. Dangerous if the raw speed materializes.
